The CMS Forwards dataset provides insights into the pricing and valuation of Constant Maturity Swap CMS forwards within the U.S. Fixed Income market. The Swaps Regional Close data is based on JPM Research analytics using front office market data, utilizing risk-free rates RFR as a foundational benchmark. It offers access to global swap closes across major trading regions. Swap curves are available for RFRs SOFR, TONAR, SONIA, and EURIBOR for USD, JPY, GBP, and EUR currencies, respectively. LIBOR-based swap curve data is available historically for USD, JPY, and GBP. The dataset includes three dimensions Currency USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, Forward Life e.g., 1 Month, 1 Year, 10 Years,  more, and Term e.g., 1 Day, 1 Month, 1 Week,  more., providing swap midrates and Modified Duration. The menu is constructed of 3 dimensions Forward Life e.g. Spot, 1 Month, 3 Months..., Market Close e.g. Tokyo, London, New York..., Currency e.g. Euro 3M Euribor, Euro 6M Euribor, Euro ESTR.... This dataset is produced by JP Morgan Rates Research Team. DataQuery API group-id  GFISWAPSGLOBALCLOSES
